morreel-coords.description: OFFLINE: ground vision-model coordinates into a .morreel file (pass 'project'). Tools: place_box, place_point, track_point, list_items.

morreel-coords-live.description: LIVE: drive the RUNNING editor over 127.0.0.1:8177 (no 'project' needed). Same tools; each edit is undoable and refreshes the monitor.
